base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_character_select — a ui (menu_screen) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Title screen + 2×2 character-select grid with Mario/Luigi/Toad/Peach portraits and stat-bars. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Title screen + 2×2 character-select grid with Mario/Luigi/Toad/Peach portraits and stat-bars; 772×1126 large composite
